system.benefit: Tech-Use Test and 10 minutes meditation to remove 1d5 Damage
system.description: Through the application of his will, the character may speed the function of his Autosanguinators. By spending 10 minutes in meditation and ritual incantation, the character may make a Tech-Use Test, and if successful, remove 1d5 points of Damage. If the character rolls a 96–100, he overstrains his implants, losing the ability to use them for one week. During that week, the character may use neither the Autosanguine nor Prosanguine Talents. Using Prosanguine requires 10 minutes of meditation and ritual incantation.
